disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Established, satisfied user of a long-acting injectable contraceptive, due for her routine 12-weekly dose
trigger_question_examples: What can I help you with today?
How long have you been using this method?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been on the injection for a while now and I'm really happy with it — I'm just due for my next one and want to keep it going.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Menstrual bleeding began about 36 hours ago (patient is within the first days of her cycle)
trigger_question_examples: When did your last period start?
Where are you in your cycle right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My period started yesterday morning, about a day and a half ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No current pregnancy suspected — active menstrual bleeding, no unprotected gap in cover
trigger_question_examples: Is there any chance you could be pregnant?
Have you had any gaps in your contraceptive cover?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chance I'm pregnant — I've got my period right now and I've been careful.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports current pattern of mostly no bleeding with occasional light spotting on this method
trigger_question_examples: What has your bleeding pattern been like on the injection?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Mostly nothing at all, just a bit of light spotting here and there — which I know is normal for this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Denies low mood, mood swings or unacceptable weight change; no history of breast lump, liver disease or severe depression on screening
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any problems with your mood, your weight, breast changes or your liver?
Any reasons a doctor has told you this method might not suit you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, none of that — my mood's fine, no big weight change, no breast lumps or liver problems. It really suits me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Departing at 0400 for a three-month remote deployment without ready medical access
trigger_question_examples: What's the time pressure you mentioned?
When exactly do you leave and for how long?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I fly out at 4 in the morning and I'm gone for three months somewhere really remote — I won't be able to see anyone about this out there.
